activities.name: SP_UPDATE_WTRMARKTABLE
activities.description: Executes a stored procedure to update the watermark value in the control table using the provided table schema, table name, and watermark column

activities.name: LKUP_MAX_VALUE
activities.description: Retrieves the maximum value of the watermark column from the source table to identify the latest available data

activities.name: IF_NEW_RECORD_EXISTS
activities.description: Checks whether new data exists by comparing the latest watermark value with the last loaded value, triggering the load if conditions are met.

ifTrueActivities.name: COPYSQL_FULL_INCTLOAD_TABLES
ifTrueActivities.description: Copies data from the source table to the target in Parquet format, performing a full load if no previous watermark exists or an incremental load by filtering records greater than the last loaded value.

properties.description: Simple PL for moving multiple files from on-prem SQL DB to ADLS.

activities.name: Lookup_SQLDB
activities.description: To check the tables inside on-premise SQL Db- AdventureWorksDW2025

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT 
    TABLE_SCHEMA, 
    TABLE_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'dbo';

activities.name: ForEach1
activities.description: To copy each TABLE_NAME to the ADLS blob storage

activities.name: Copy data1
activities.description: copy each file to adls blob storage

activities.name: LKUP_SQLTABLE_WATERMARK_DW
activities.description: This query extracts metadata, including schema, table name, watermark column, and last processed value, from the ADF watermark table.

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT TableSchema, TableName, WatermarkColumn, LastLoadValue FROM dbo.ADF_Watermark_Table;

activities.name: ForEachSQLTable
activities.description: This expression retrieves the array of records returned by the lookup activity, which is used as input for iteration in the ForEach activity.

activities.name: Execute Pipeline1
activities.description: This pipeline invokes the child pipeline by dynamically passing parameters
